form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (18.05) at this track in a TG1-4W. Lines up from box 1 for the first time. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 6 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Looks a leading contender on best and expected to bounce back.
